ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Due Next Week
ham.body:
Dear Team,

I hope you are all doing well. This is a friendly reminder that the semester project submissions are due on Monday, 12 May 2024. Please ensure that your final reports and presentations are uploaded to the course portal by 11:59 PM on the due date.

**Submission Checklist**
- Project report (PDF, max 10 pages)
- Source code archive (ZIP)
- Slide deck (PDF)
- Documentation of experiments and results

If you encounter any technical issues while uploading, contact the IT support desk at <URL> for assistance.

Thank you for your hard work and dedication.

Best regards,
Professor Jane Smith
Department of Computer Science
University of Example

spam.subject: Urgent: Your University Scholarship Application Status
spam.body:
Dear Applicant,

We are pleased to inform you that you have been shortlisted for the prestigious International Excellence Scholarship offered by the University of Example. However, to finalize your award and process the disbursement, we require immediate verification of your personal details.

Please click the link below to review and confirm your information. Failure to comply within 48 hours will result in automatic withdrawal of your scholarship candidacy.

<URL>

This is a confidential and time‑sensitive matter. If you have any questions, reply to this email or call our scholarship office at +1-800-555-1234.

Congratulations again, and we look forward to confirming your award.

Sincerely,
Dr. Alan Grant
Scholarship Coordinator
University of Example
